# Feature request

## Problem
What are you trying to do that canopy doesn't currently support?

## Proposed solution
A clear, short description of what you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered
Have you tried a workaround? Did you look at `~/.hermes/scripts/canopy.py` or the upstream `DandyLyons/treedocs` for similar behavior?

## Additional context
Anything else — links, screenshots, related issues.
